notes: Ley Fintech and CNBV secondary regulations require beneficiary ITFs (Instituciones de Tecnología Financiera) to verify originator information for virtual asset transfers. Risk-based approach for incomplete transfers — no absolute rejection mandate. CURP or RFC required for Mexican beneficiaries. Record retention: 5 years per Ley Federal para la Prevención e Identificación de Operaciones con Recursos de Procedencia Ilícita.
